title: Chino's Knuckles
description: Adds knuckles and leather slides to the game.
body:
A mod that adds knuckles and leather slides to the game.

Knuckles have a crazy damage output but can only be used while dual wielded and have half the durability.

Leather slides increases your speed at the cost of some armor (You can walk on powder snow too!).

Highly recommended to play with Better Combat installed.

---

This mod is based off of this video, shout out to Chino's Animated for the crazy good animation: https://www.youtube.com/shorts/YlRUgWmW4S8

---

Considering of adding custom enchants atm - who knows? it might happen, it might not.
